creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
% kldstat | grep vb
20    3 0xffffffff82d4a000    8f088 vboxdrv.ko
55    2 0xffffffff835cb000     4218 vboxnetflt.ko
57    1 0xffffffff835d4000     55e0 vboxnetadp.ko
% pkg info -x virtualbox
virtualbox-ose-6.1.18
virtualbox-ose-kmod-6.1.18_1
% freebsd-version -kru
14.0-CURRENT
14.0-CURRENT
14.0-CURRENT
% 

… no crash.
